ModMetaData.name: Valkyria Rimworld (Continued)
ModMetaData.author: chemora
ModMetaData.description: Original mod by Itzal! This is an update. You can find the original here: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1975432095 \n Valkyria Chronicles comes to Rimworld! This mod currently features various weapons and outfits from the game series Valkyria Chronicles, with a large focus on the fourth instalment. Many, many thanks to Higgs for creating the outfits in this mod. It wouldn't feel quite right without them.
